review:
ISSUES:
- [severity:warning] .claude/hooks/agentTracer.js:106 - Success detection via regex `/(error|failed|exception)/i` on `responseText` is brittle and may misclassify successful responses that discuss fixed errors or exceptions as failures.
- [severity:info] .claude/hooks/parallelCoordinator.js:128 - The `extractTargetFiles` regex is restricted to `src/`, `./`, and `tests/` prefixes, which will miss target files in `infra/`, `docs/`, or root-level configuration files.
- [severity:info] .claude/hooks/parallelCoordinator.js:141 - File lock conflicts are currently advisory; the hook configuration `|| true` prevents it from blocking tool execution even when a collision is detected.

VERDICT: approve
SUMMARY: Enhancements to agent coordination (locking, tracing, state) and critical deterministic UUID generation for the Qdrant migration are well-implemented, though some hook heuristics remain advisory.
